## Checklist
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main` (`git pull --rebase origin main`)
- [ ] Migration added (if I touched models) and applies cleanly on a fresh DB
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass locally
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or large binaries committed
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Docs updated if the API contract changed
